options: $f(x) = m$ has exactly two real solutions of different sign $\forall m > 2$
$f(x) = m$ has exactly two real solutions $\forall m \in (2, \infty) \cup \{0\}$
$f(x) = m$ has four distinct real solution $\forall m \in (0, 1)$
